Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The typical sequence is Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1001 This looks normal The order is logical requisition approved PO issued goods received invoice received matching payment close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1002 Anomalies The Approve Purchase Requisition happens after Issue Purchase Order That is out of order approval should come before issuing PO Also Release Payment occurs before Approve Purchase Requisition and before Receive Goods That is problematic payment released before goods received and before requisition approved Also Vendor Invoice Received occurs before Approve Purchase Requisition and before Receive Goods

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Additionally in case 1002 Match Invoice to PO occurs after Receive Goods and after Release Payment However matching should happen before payment not after So that is also an anomaly payment released before matching

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1003 Anomalies Release Payment occurs before Vendor Invoice Received before Receive Goods and before Match Invoice to PO That is highly unusual payment released without receiving invoice or goods and without matching

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1004 Anomalies Receive Goods occurs before Issue Purchase Order That is out of order goods should be received after PO is issued not before

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That could indicate that goods were received without a PO which is a control issue no PO for receiving Also note that the PO is issued after goods receipt that might be a corrective action but still non standard

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we have several anomalies Case 1002 Approve Purchase Requisition after Issue Purchase Order Release Payment before Approve Purchase Requisition before Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received before Approve Purchase Requisition and before Receive Goods Case 1003 Release Payment before Vendor Invoice Received before Receive Goods before Match Invoice to PO Case 1004 Receive Goods before Issue Purchase Order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Typically the P2P process is designed to ensure that the company only pays for goods services that were properly requested approved received and matched to an invoice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Key controls Purchase requisition must be approved before a PO is issued to ensure legitimacy and budget compliance PO must be issued before goods are received to provide a baseline for receiving report Goods must be received before invoice is processed or at least before payment to confirm receipt Invoice must be matched to PO and receiving report before payment to avoid overpayments duplicate payments or payments for unordered goods Payment should be made after all approvals and matching and typically after the invoice is received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies violate these controls leading to risks unauthorized purchases overpayments fraud budget overruns
